reviews.comment:
Sitio ágil y confiable para la carga de combustible, ofrece una amplia gama de servicios, considerando que es la sede central del ACA

(Translated by Google)
An agile and reliable fuel loading site, it offers a wide range of services, considering that it is the headquarters of the ACA.

reviews.comment:
Paso todos los sábados al toilette ya que con un grupo hacemos una salida en patines. Siempre impecable.

(Translated by Google)
I go to the restroom every Saturday because a group of us goes skating. Always spotless.

reviews.comment:
Buen precio, excelente lugar y pese a la gran cantidad de vehiculos el despacho es bastante rápido.

(Translated by Google)
Good price, excellent location, and despite the large number of vehicles, the service is quite fast.

reviews.comment:

The peace of mind of filling up with gas, knowing that what they offer in quality is what they give you.

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención día sábado por la noche 1 sola isla habilitada 50 minutos de cola , baños cerrados , shop cerrado es una vergüenza nacional y una burla al cliente , me fuí sin cargar y cargué en axion

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service Saturday night. Only one pump island open, 50-minute wait, restrooms closed, shop closed. It's a national disgrace and an insult to customers. I left without filling up and filled up at Axion.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHMHZUUmt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay mucha gente, a pesar de las 12 estaciones para cargar, a las 7 de la mañana, espere mas de 20 minutos ya que cambian el sistema de facturacion????? los empleados dan vueltas y vueltas para evitar atender.

(Translated by Google)
There are always a lot of people, despite the 12 charging stations. At 7 a.m., I waited more than 20 minutes because they changed the billing system. The employees were wandering around trying to avoid serving me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHbk9TeGVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del playero y lo mejor es cargar combustible a las 530am, no hay nadie.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the gas station attendant and the best time to refuel is at 5:30 am, there's nobody there.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service.... There may be a line of cars waiting, but the staff attends to each one with care.
